heroSub: The visual dictionary of UI. See the element, learn its real name, and prompt your coding agent with precision. Double-press any word on the site for a plain-English definition.
heroSubZh: UI 视觉词典。看到元素，学会它的真名，然后精准地指挥你的 AI 编程代理。双击站内任意英文单词，查看通俗释义。
vibePromo: Can’t name the look either? Try Name That Vibe
vibePromoZh: 连「感觉」也叫不上来？试试 Name That Vibe
searchPlaceholder: Describe the UI element you’re thinking of
searchPlaceholderZh: 描述你想到的那个 UI 元素
guidesTitle: Guides — the decisions before the names
guidesTitleZh: 指南 —— 起名之前要做的决定
guide1Desc: The same Mac element has two real names — which one to say in a prompt.
guide1DescZh: 同一个 Mac 元素有两个真名 —— 写 prompt 时该说哪一个。
guide2Desc: Native app or web-in-a-shell — the first fork, and the vocabulary it decides.
guide2DescZh: 原生应用还是壳中网页 —— 第一个岔路口，以及它决定的词汇表。
guide3Desc: 60+ elements: plain name → AppKit → SwiftUI, searchable.
guide3DescZh: 60+ 个元素：通俗名 → AppKit → SwiftUI，可搜索。
anatomyZh: 解剖 —— 每个部件的名字
promptSectionZh: Prompt —— 直接粘贴给你的代理
debugSectionZh: 调试 Prompt —— 当它不听话时
translateLede: The same Mac element has two real names, one per framework. Find the thing, take the column your project speaks — not sure which? Read this first.
translateLedeZh: 同一个 Mac 元素有两个真名，每个框架一个。找到那个东西，拿走你项目说的那一列 —— 不确定用哪个？先读这篇。
translateCount: {n} of {total} translations · underlined things link to their visual entry
translateCountZh: {n} / {total} 条翻译 · 带下划线的条目可跳转到视觉词条
searchNoResult: Nothing matches. Try describing it differently — “the dots menu”, “mac window buttons”.
searchNoResultZh: 没有匹配的词条。换个说法试试 ——「三个点的菜单」「Mac 窗口按钮」。
entriesCount: {n} elements, each one seeable, nameable, promptable
entriesCountZh: {n} 个元素，每一个都看得见、叫得出、可指挥
builtNote: Bilingual replica of namethatui.com for learning. Original content © its author.
builtNoteZh: namethatui.com 的中英双语学习复刻版。原内容版权归原作者所有。
stylesCount: {n} styles — recognize the look, learn its real name
stylesCountZh: {n} 种风格 —— 认出长相，学会真名
searchStylesPlaceholder: Describe the look you’re thinking of
searchStylesPlaceholderZh: 描述你想到的那种「感觉」
governedTitle: A governed atlas, not a style dump
governedTitleZh: 有治理的图鉴，不是风格仓库
styleCodeTitleZh: 代码写法 —— 可选起点
briefTitle: Style brief — paste into your agent
briefTitleZh: 风格 Brief —— 粘贴给你的代理
quizDesc: See a specimen, name it — or see a name, pick the specimen. Two correct answers in a row and it's mastered. Keep going until you've mastered all 86.
quizDescZh: 看标本叫名字，或看名字认标本。连对 2 次算掌握，直到 86 个全部掌握为止。
quizAllDone: All mastered — you really know every component and style now.
quizAllDoneZh: 全部掌握——这些组件和风格你是真的都认识了。
